text: What was Apple's most recent quarterly revenue?
answer_prose:
Apple's most recent quarterly revenue for the three months ended December 27, 2025, was $143,756 million. This figure represents the total net sales across various segments, including the Americas, Europe, Greater China, Japan, and the Rest of Asia Pacific. The breakdown of net sales by region is as follows:

- Americas: $58,529 million
- Europe: $38,146 million
- Greater China: $25,526 million
- Japan: $9,413 million
- Rest of Asia Pacific: $12,142 million

This information is sourced from the Q1 2026 Form 10-Q filed by Apple Inc. on January 30, 2026, specifically from the financial statements section [Apple Inc., 10-Q, 2026-01-30, Section: financial_statements].
score_notes: Match within 0.5% (got 143756.0M, want 143756.0M).

text: What was Apple's most recent quarterly cost of revenue?
answer_prose:
Apple's most recent quarterly cost of revenue for the three months ended December 27, 2025, was $74.525 billion. This figure is derived from the total cost of sales reported in the financial statements section of the Q1 2026 Form 10-Q. The breakdown of the cost of sales by region is as follows:

- Americas: $31.849 billion
- Europe: $19.061 billion
- Greater China: $13.030 billion
- Japan: $4.511 billion
- Rest of Asia Pacific: $6.074 billion

The total cost of sales across all regions sums up to $74.525 billion for the quarter [Apple Inc., 10-Q, 2026-01-30, Section: financial_statements].
score_notes: Match within 0.5% (got 74525.0M, want 74525.0M).

text: What was Apple's most recent quarterly cost of revenue?
answer_prose:
Apple's most recent quarterly cost of revenue, for the three months ended December 27, 2025, was $74.525 billion. This figure is derived from the total cost of sales, which includes costs associated with both products and services sold during that period. 

The breakdown of the cost of sales for the segments is as follows:
- Americas: $31.849 billion
- Europe: $19.061 billion
- Greater China: $13.030 billion
- Japan: $4.511 billion
- Rest of Asia Pacific: $6.074 billion
- Corporate: $0

The total cost of sales sums up to $74.525 billion for the quarter [Apple Inc., 10-Q, 2026-01-30, Section: financial_statements].

text: What was Apple's most recent quarterly net income?
answer_prose:
Apple's most recent quarterly net income, for the three months ended December 27, 2025, was $42,097 million. This figure represents an increase from the net income of $36,330 million for the same period in the previous year, December 28, 2024. 

This information is sourced from the Q1 2026 Form 10-Q filed on January 30, 2026, specifically from the financial statements section [Apple Inc., 10-Q, 2026-01-30, Section: financial_statements].

text: What was Meta's most recent quarterly revenue?
answer_prose:
Meta Platforms Inc.'s most recent quarterly revenue, for the three months ended September 30, 2025, was $51,242 million. This figure represents an increase from the previous year's revenue of $40,589 million for the same period.
